{{Quote|Remaining Viper staff were relocated to the testing wing while three XR-37 tank units obliterated the building's top floors which housed accounting and administrative divisions.|"Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover"|<ref name="Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover" />}}
The '''XR-37''' was a model of [[Droid tank/Legends|droid tank]].<ref name="Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover" /> Shortly before the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|4|AAD-4}}</ref> three of these units were used by [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]] to obliterate [[Viper Tower]]'s top floors during its armed takeover of [[Viper Sensor Intelligence Systems]].<ref name="Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover" />

==Behind the scenes==
The XR-37 was originally created for ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 50]]'', a [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]] article written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]] with illustrations by [[Joe Corroney]] and released on [[April 4]], [[2002]].<ref name="Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover" />
